expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight header present. Three checks ran before the plan: call graph, arithmetic (three warnings), resources. ADJUST PLAN verdict.

Arithmetic flagged with three issues: (1) pre-multiply overflow on interval *= 2, (2) signed/unsigned mismatch between backoff timer interval and BLE connection params, (3) unit mismatch (ms vs RTOS ticks).
